checklist: EMO AI v1.0.0 — Launch Readiness Checklist

gates.name: All P1-P9 certificates present and valid
gates.notes: Certificates for P1 through P9 verified in artifacts/product/

gates.name: Zero unsigned packages in distribution
gates.notes: All packages signed via signing pipeline

gates.name: Zero critical security findings
gates.notes: Security audit passed — 0 critical, 0 high findings

gates.name: Rollback plan documented and tested
gates.notes: rollback-executor.ts implements <5 min rollback with simulateRollback

gates.name: Documentation portal live with all 5 guides indexed
gates.notes: docs/portal/index.html with search.ts indexing all 5 guides

gates.name: Monitoring alerts active with correct thresholds
gates.notes: production-alerts.ts with crash_rate >1%, latency >2s, unsigned_update rules

gates.name: Stable channel promoted with rollout plan
Backward compatibility verified
gates.notes: verifyBackwardCompatibility() checks configs, versions, data integrity

gates.name: Beta channel pull plan in place
gates.notes: pullBetaChannel() redirects beta users to stable with notification

gates.name: All P10 tests pass (20/20)
gates.notes: Tests: channel promotion, alert routing, docs portal, rollback, integration

gates.name: Core freeze enforced — zero imports from core/ or releases/
gates.notes: All P10 modules verified — zero core/releases dependencies
